items.title: Amazon to provide 2,000 free rapid response technology systems that restore critical services in minutes
items.summary: Each system is portable enough for one person to carry and set up, now scaling 50x ahead of hurricane season.

items.title: Pinterest inks $4 billion AI deal with AWS, the largest infrastructure commitment in its history
items.summary: The visual discovery platform deepens its over decade-long relationship with AWS to accelerate AI innovation for more than 600 million month

items.title: Amazon announces new robotics, faster delivery expansion in Europe, and $1 billion in employee upskilling
items.summary: Amazon unveiled a next-generation Proteus robot and more ultra-fast delivery options, plus a European fulfillment workforce expansion.
